_comment: the creator's real phrases and voice patterns. Grows over time as the creator uses the system. voice-engine.md checks this file and weights these examples above its seed list when non-empty.
_gitignore_note: Your real phrases go in voice-profile.local.json (gitignored, never overwritten by git pull). This committed file is the seed vocabulary only. voice-engine.md loads voice-profile.local.json first, then falls back to this file.
notes: Add phrases as the creator produces content. Pull from video descriptions, pinned comments, captions she has approved, and anything she writes in the first person. Even 5 to 10 real entries dramatically improve output authenticity.
